GOOG.reasoning: TREND ASSESSMENT: Strongly bullish. MOMENTUM ASSESSMENT: Strongly accelerating. Daily ROC 5d=+13.08%, 10d=+14.78%, 21d=+33.15% — all positive and expanding across longer timeframes, driven by a massive gap-up on 2026-04-30 (+10% on 2.6x average volume). OVEREXTENSION / ENTRY RULES VIOLATED: This strategy requires entry on a pullback to the 10 or 21 EMA. LESSONS APPLIED: The most recent trade lesson (NVDA, 2026-04-30, -$264.65) explicitly flags RSI 81-87 as a failure contributor on a momentum setup — GOOG's RSI is squarely in that same zone. Chasing at current levels replicates the losing setup. MACRO: Risk-on regime (S&P at ATH), supportive but near-term policy uncertainty from Fed chair transition. VERDICT: Trend and momentum are both emphatically bullish, but the entry criteria are not met. Waiting for a pullback to the 10 EMA (~$347-350) or 21 EMA (~$333-335) before triggering.
